summary: Iteration 22: Testing Implant Planning integration and Phase 2/3/4 submit form updates. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - Implant Planning section with 3/6 count, Torque Values in Phase 2, Student Clinical Assessment in Phase 3, 3 remark fields + prosthetic plan dropdown in Phase 4.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend implant plan API correctly validates 1-6 implants and unique tooth positions
Backend Phase 2 submit accepts torque_values as List[float]
Backend Phase 4 submit accepts faculty_remark, incharge_remark, final_prosthetic_plan fields
Frontend CaseImplantPlanning component has data-testid='case-implant-planning' and shows count/6 badge
Frontend Phase 2 form shows dynamic torque input fields per implant with tooth position labels
Frontend Phase 3 form has 'Student Clinical Assessment' text field
Frontend Phase 4 form has Student Remark, Faculty Remark, Implant Incharge Remark fields
Frontend checklist.ts has all 10 items for Phase 1 pre_surgical
Phase submit endpoints correctly return 400 when procedure is in wrong status (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Test procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 used for testing, implant plans restored to 3 implants after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implant Planning and Phase submit forms fully tested. Phase 2 form has torque inputs per implant (labeled with tooth position). Phase 3 has Student Clinical Assessment field. Phase 4 has 3 remark fields (student/faculty/incharge) plus Final Prosthetic Plan dropdown. Backend implant-plan API supports save/get with 1-6 implants, validates unique positions. Test procedure ID: 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 (student: Gaurav Pandey).

backend_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan: PASS - Returns implant_plans array and number_of_implants

frontend_components.CaseImplantPlanning component: PASS - Renders on procedure detail page
frontend_components.Phase 2 Torque Values section: PASS - Title 'Torque Values Achieved (Ncm)' with helper text
frontend_components.Phase 4 Final Prosthetic Plan dropdown: PASS - Conditional based on procedure type

checklist_data.Phase 1 (pre_surgical) has 10 items: PASS - case_selection, academic_readiness, hematological, radiographic, treatment_plan, oral_prophylaxis, instruments, medical_assessment, realguide, payment
